# Google Review Outreach Templates

**Review link:** https://g.page/r/CUHmU0rIL7VhEBM/review
**Goal:** Get to 5 reviews fast — Google doesn't show a star rating publicly until you hit 5.

---

## For people who know you personally (text/DM)

> Hey [name], quick favor — I just launched RubyxQube and I'm trying to get my first few Google reviews. If you know me and my work, even a sentence would mean a lot. Takes about 30 seconds: https://g.page/r/CUHmU0rIL7VhEBM/review

---

## For professional contacts (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook DM)

> Hey! I recently launched my web design agency RubyxQube and I'm building up my Google presence. If you'd be willing to leave a quick review I'd really appreciate it — you can do it here: https://g.page/r/CUHmU0rIL7VhEBM/review — no pressure at all, just means a lot at this stage.

---

## For email (former coworkers, professional network)

> Hi [name], hope you're doing well. I recently launched RubyxQube, a web design and AI agency for small businesses here in Boise. If you've seen my work or know me professionally, a Google review would genuinely help — it only takes a minute: https://g.page/r/CUHmU0rIL7VhEBM/review. Really appreciate it.

---

## For completed clients (project launch email — add at the bottom)

> One last thing — if you're happy with how it turned out, a quick Google review helps more than you know: https://g.page/r/CUHmU0rIL7VhEBM/review. Takes 30 seconds and means a lot.

---

## Notes

- Ask at the moment they're happiest — right after the site goes live for clients
- Don't ask for all 5 at once — stagger them over a few days so Google doesn't flag them
- Wife (YouTube channel) is a valid reviewer IF you build her a real site — keep her as a backup
- Do NOT review your own business or ask anyone with a financial interest in RubyxQube
- QR code lives at `src/assets/qr/RubyxQubeReviewQR.png` — use on invoices, business cards, etc.
